About

I'm Silvery Fu. I work with businesses to shape and scale products.

Previously, I did my PhD in Computer Science at UC Berkeley, where I developed a software stack for the Internet of Data Apps.

You can explore my projects by topic.

Contact: silvery@sys.studio
